title: Nginx Real IP Behind Proxy Example
summary: Restore client IP addresses behind a trusted proxy in Nginx.
verification_setup: Install Nginx on a staging host.
Confirm the build or package includes ngx_http_realip_module before validation.
Replace the trusted CIDR with the exact proxy or load balancer range before validation.
verification_command: Manual verification only; see README.md for the staging checklist.
verification_notes: Not executed. The example follows the official Nginx real-IP module syntax, but it still requires nginx -t and a real trusted proxy path on a staging host before use.
